features.evidence: 5 in 3x2 aspect ratio display to a larger 14 in one with a standard 16 by10 aspect ratio so technically you don t see quite as much information going down the page but the the increased screen size makes up for that and this year s model includes intel s new core ultra media leg processor so let s start with performance price spectors used intel s low powered u series processors this enabled them to be thin and light with acceptable heat and fan noise but they sacrificed when it came to performance their performance was really only good enough for light use browsing the web and working on office documents perhaps a good stretch a little further to say starting to be a software developer but the good news here is that this year s model gives you substantially more performance in line with intel s 13th gen h series processors which last year were found in much larger more powerful gaming laptops and this year s laptop pri years it still doesn t get overly warm to the touch or have annoying fan noise in fact it is the first laptop that i ve tested with the new core ultra processor that i m yeah this makes a difference and it s not only cpu performance that s a lot better the arc integrated graphics in this new processor is much better than prior years i played league of legends on it and it delivered extremely high frame rates at mac settings on the screen s native high resolution look it s not going to give you decent frame rates in modern aaa titles but it s certainly good enough to enjoy some older titles and dabble in some light video editing on now let s talk a bit more about heat and fan noise as that really is another strong point of this laptop in light use browsing the web or writing the script for this very video this laptop was pretty much silent and didn t get that warm to the touch in total transparency there were some occasions where the laptop did get a little warm but it was manageable and while playing league of legends i measured a max of 39 celsius on the keyboard deck and palm rest after 1 hour of gameplay that is a really phenomenal result and when the fans are on they run at a consistent low volume and aren t high pitched so it s not overly disturbing and any background noise at all will block it out and fyi the core ultra processor in this laptop does have hardware acceleration for basic ai tasks as long as your software has been updated to make use of it you ll find tasks using the background blow effect while on a video call won t generate as much heat and fan noise as on a laptop without this capability battery performance is also a strong point of this laptop when on battery power there is no drop in the laptop s performance we dimmed the screen to 200 nits of brightness and ran a netflix video on repeat over wi fi for 4 hours at the end of the test we recorded 71 remaining this is an absolutely fantastic result only beat out by the macbook pro 14 but that laptop is a bit heavier with a larger battery overall if you use this hb spectre for light use taking notes during class or watching a movie on a plane you re really going to appreciate its battery life now if you do want to run the laptop for performance tasks when on battery which by the way i don t recommend as it tends to quickly degrade your battery we ran cinebench on a loop for 30 minutes at the end of this test this laptop had 62 remaining which is within the realms of what we would expect onto the chassis it s pretty well built and the color of our model looks great the hinges are tight and although the lid isn t as strong as a macbook it s strong enough and fyi pri specters did use to come with a laptop sleeve included this us model does not moving on to the keyboard it is an absolute joy to type on specters always had very comfortable keyboards i literally bought the first spectre 14 when it was released to write my scripts on because the keyboard was so good well this year s model is a step up the keys have one of the most satisfying clicks of any thin and light laptop that i ve ever tested also the material used on them has this very light soft rubbery texture to it that texture makes it feel oho good on your fingertips the keyboard layout has also been improved there are no special keys to the right side of the keyboard that used to result in me mis pressing keys instead we have a standard layout if you do need those page up down home and end keys they re now secondary functions of the arrow keys the implementation of the keyboard backlight is topnotch but drum roll please finally on the silver model you can see the key characters in all lighting conditions silver hp laptops have been notorious for having light colored keys with a light colored backlight making the keys impossible to make out in certain lighting conditions the silver spectre now has a darker colored keyboard for contrast yay all spectre 14s this laptop has a touchscreen and it can be converted into a tablet in fact it recognized the change in operating mode from laptop to tablet faster than any other 2inone i ve tested others tend to lag when converting in fact it was so seamless i kept double checking whether it had switch modes at all the laptop comes with an active pen that you can charge via the usbc power adapter the pen has over 4,000 pressure levels it supports tilt functionality and it comes with various replaceable tips when not in use it can attach via magnets to the side of the laptop in total transparency i m not an artist myself but i found the touch functionality both with and without the pen incredibly responsive when it comes to ports i think you get all the ports you really need on such a laptop you have two usbc ports that are both thunderbolt 4 and are used for charging the laptop and those ports support the new display port 2

the new hb spectre 14 for 2024 may just be the best windows laptop that i ve ever used seriously even ethan said this year spectre 14 is pretty good i think i m going to have to get myself one so today i m going to tell you why this laptop is so phenomenal in fact it is so good that we couldn t help ourselves but compare it to the macbook pro 14 a winner of the best laptop for the last 2 years but even though it s a great laptop just my ex girlfriend it s not perfect so i m also going to share all the little annoyances that you need to be aware of before you buy one finally as always i ll finish off by telling you how it stacks up first the competition and what you should probably pay for it now the spectre 14 is hb s premium consumer laptop it s a two in one device so that means it can convert into a tablet and this year s model is a redesign it moves from a 13

5 in 3x2 aspect ratio display to a larger 14 in one with a standard 16 by10 aspect ratio so technically you don t see quite as much information going down the page but the the increased screen size makes up for that and this year s model includes intel s new core ultra media leg processor so let s start with performance price spectors used intel s low powered u series processors this enabled them to be thin and light with acceptable heat and fan noise but they sacrificed when it came to performance their performance was really only good enough for light use browsing the web and working on office documents perhaps a good stretch a little further to say starting to be a software developer but the good news here is that this year s model gives you substantially more performance in line with intel s 13th gen h series processors which last year were found in much larger more powerful gaming laptops and this year s laptop pri years it still doesn t get overly warm to the touch or have annoying fan noise in fact it is the first laptop that i ve tested with the new core ultra processor that i m yeah this makes a difference and it s not only cpu performance that s a lot better the arc integrated graphics in this new processor is much better than prior years i played league of legends on it and it delivered extremely high frame rates at mac settings on the screen s native high resolution look it s not going to give you decent frame rates in modern aaa titles but it s certainly good enough to enjoy some older titles and dabble in some light video editing on now let s talk a bit more about heat and fan noise as that really is another strong point of this laptop in light use browsing the web or writing the script for this very video this laptop was pretty much silent and didn t get that warm to the touch in total transparency there were some occasions where the laptop did get a little warm but it was manageable and while playing league of legends i measured a max of 39 celsius on the keyboard deck and palm rest after 1 hour of gameplay that is a really phenomenal result and when the fans are on they run at a consistent low volume and aren t high pitched so it s not overly disturbing and any background noise at all will block it out and fyi the core ultra processor in this laptop does have hardware acceleration for basic ai tasks as long as your software has been updated to make use of it you ll find tasks using the background blow effect while on a video call won t generate as much heat and fan noise as on a laptop without this capability battery performance is also a strong point of this laptop when on battery power there is no drop in the laptop s performance we dimmed the screen to 200 nits of brightness and ran a netflix video on repeat over wi fi for 4 hours at the end of the test we recorded 71 remaining this is an absolutely fantastic result only beat out by the macbook pro 14 but that laptop is a bit heavier with a larger battery overall if you use this hb spectre for light use taking notes during class or watching a movie on a plane you re really going to appreciate its battery life now if you do want to run the laptop for performance tasks when on battery which by the way i don t recommend as it tends to quickly degrade your battery we ran cinebench on a loop for 30 minutes at the end of this test this laptop had 62 remaining which is within the realms of what we would expect onto the chassis it s pretty well built and the color of our model looks great the hinges are tight and although the lid isn t as strong as a macbook it s strong enough and fyi pri specters did use to come with a laptop sleeve included this us model does not moving on to the keyboard it is an absolute joy to type on specters always had very comfortable keyboards i literally bought the first spectre 14 when it was released to write my scripts on because the keyboard was so good well this year s model is a step up the keys have one of the most satisfying clicks of any thin and light laptop that i ve ever tested also the material used on them has this very light soft rubbery texture to it that texture makes it feel oho good on your fingertips the keyboard layout has also been improved there are no special keys to the right side of the keyboard that used to result in me mis pressing keys instead we have a standard layout if you do need those page up down home and end keys they re now secondary functions of the arrow keys the implementation of the keyboard backlight is topnotch but drum roll please finally on the silver model you can see the key characters in all lighting conditions silver hp laptops have been notorious for having light colored keys with a light colored backlight making the keys impossible to make out in certain lighting conditions the silver spectre now has a darker colored keyboard for contrast yay all spectre 14s this laptop has a touchscreen and it can be converted into a tablet in fact it recognized the change in operating mode from laptop to tablet faster than any other 2inone i ve tested others tend to lag when converting in fact it was so seamless i kept double checking whether it had switch modes at all the laptop comes with an active pen that you can charge via the usbc power adapter the pen has over 4,000 pressure levels it supports tilt functionality and it comes with various replaceable tips when not in use it can attach via magnets to the side of the laptop in total transparency i m not an artist myself but i found the touch functionality both with and without the pen incredibly responsive when it comes to ports i think you get all the ports you really need on such a laptop you have two usbc ports that are both thunderbolt 4 and are used for charging the laptop and those ports support the new display port 2

various replaceable tips when not in use it can attach via magnets to the side of the laptop in total transparency i m not an artist myself but i found the touch functionality both with and without the pen incredibly responsive when it comes to ports i think you get all the ports you really need on such a laptop you have two usbc ports that are both thunderbolt 4 and are used for charging the laptop and those ports support the new display port 2

1 standard you also have one fast 10 gb usba port and a headphone mic combo jack if you need more ports you do get two dongles in the box that will give you hdmi and additional usba ports in terms of the port layout i ve really grown to the weird port location of the single usbc port on the back corner of the laptop it keeps the cable nicely out of the way and if you do need to access a your bc port you do have the one on the right side available to you the speakers on this laptop are amongst the best of any 14 in i ve ever used they are super loud crazy loud and they are surprisingly clear even at high volumes but they re still second to the macbook pro 14 s best in industry speakers compared to that laptop they don t have as much base and their sound stage just isn t as immersive the laptop also has a fingerprint reader in the power button and windows hello facial recognition overall the 1440 webcam looks pretty good colors look pleasing and accurate although it is a little bit oversaturated and check this out if you press the laptop s camera privacy button a physical cover is moved across the front of the camera super cool the laptop has replaceable storage and wi fi which by the way is the new wi fi 7 unfortunately memory is solded but you can get it with 32 gigs and unlike some other manufacturers hp is reasonable with its pricing for this upgrade all right so that s a lot of good things but if you re neurotic us here here s what may bug you with this laptop firstly the trackpads palm rejection it isn t great the trackpad as a whole though is really good it s super accurate and it feels very natural to use in fact i noticed no difference using a macbook s trackpad and then switching over to this laptop and that is a huge win for hp but the palm rejection it s pretty bad many times while writing this script the cursor would just jump i wouldn t say it stop me from enjoying using the laptop but it is an issue and i frequently found myself typing with my wrist raised to avoid touching the trackpad this is something that hp can likely improve with the driver or software update next the lid is surprisingly hard to open there is nothing for your finger to catch on so your finger ends up just sliding over the area where you would normally pull the lid open to open it i found myself just wedging my fingernails in there on the weight although i wouldn t exactly call this laptop heavy at around 3

5 in 3x2 aspect ratio display to a larger 14 in one with a standard 16 by10 aspect ratio so technically you don t see quite as much information going down the page but the the increased screen size makes up for that and this year s model includes intel s new core ultra media leg processor so let s start with performance price spectors used intel s low powered u series processors this enabled them to be thin and light with acceptable heat and fan noise but they sacrificed when it came to performance their performance was really only good enough for light use browsing the web and working on office documents perhaps a good stretch a little further to say starting to be a software developer but the good news here is that this year s model gives you substantially more performance in line with intel s 13th gen h series processors which last year were found in much larger more powerful gaming laptops and this year s laptop pri years it still doesn t get overly warm to the touch or have annoying fan noise in fact it is the first laptop that i ve tested with the new core ultra processor that i m yeah this makes a difference and it s not only cpu performance that s a lot better the arc integrated graphics in this new processor is much better than prior years i played league of legends on it and it delivered extremely high frame rates at mac settings on the screen s native high resolution look it s not going to give you decent frame rates in modern aaa titles but it s certainly good enough to enjoy some older titles and dabble in some light video editing on now let s talk a bit more about heat and fan noise as that really is another strong point of this laptop in light use browsing the web or writing the script for this very video this laptop was pretty much silent and didn t get that warm to the touch in total transparency there were some occasions where the laptop did get a little warm but it was manageable and while playing league of legends i measured a max of 39 celsius on the keyboard deck and palm rest after 1 hour of gameplay that is a really phenomenal result and when the fans are on they run at a consistent low volume and aren t high pitched so it s not overly disturbing and any background noise at all will block it out and fyi the core ultra processor in this laptop does have hardware acceleration for basic ai tasks as long as your software has been updated to make use of it you ll find tasks using the background blow effect while on a video call won t generate as much heat and fan noise as on a laptop without this capability battery performance is also a strong point of this laptop when on battery power there is no drop in the laptop s performance we dimmed the screen to 200 nits of brightness and ran a netflix video on repeat over wi fi for 4 hours at the end of the test we recorded 71 remaining this is an absolutely fantastic result only beat out by the macbook pro 14 but that laptop is a bit heavier with a larger battery overall if you use this hb spectre for light use taking notes during class or watching a movie on a plane you re really going to appreciate its battery life now if you do want to run the laptop for performance tasks when on battery which by the way i don t recommend as it tends to quickly degrade your battery we ran cinebench on a loop for 30 minutes at the end of this test this laptop had 62 remaining which is within the realms of what we would expect onto the chassis it s pretty well built and the color of our model looks great the hinges are tight and although the lid isn t as strong as a macbook it s strong enough and fyi pri specters did use to come with a laptop sleeve included this us model does not moving on to the keyboard it is an absolute joy to type on specters always had very comfortable keyboards i literally bought the first spectre 14 when it was released to write my scripts on because the keyboard was so good well this year s model is a step up the keys have one of the most satisfying clicks of any thin and light laptop that i ve ever tested also the material used on them has this very light soft rubbery texture to it that texture makes it feel oho good on your fingertips the keyboard layout has also been improved there are no special keys to the right side of the keyboard that used to result in me mis pressing keys instead we have a standard layout if you do need those page up down home and end keys they re now secondary functions of the arrow keys the implementation of the keyboard backlight is topnotch but drum roll please finally on the silver model you can see the key characters in all lighting conditions silver hp laptops have been notorious for having light colored keys with a light colored backlight making the keys impossible to make out in certain lighting conditions the silver spectre now has a darker colored keyboard for contrast yay all spectre 14s this laptop has a touchscreen and it can be converted into a tablet in fact it recognized the change in operating mode from laptop to tablet faster than any other 2inone i ve tested others tend to lag when converting in fact it was so seamless i kept double checking whether it had switch modes at all the laptop comes with an active pen that you can charge via the usbc power adapter the pen has over 4,000 pressure levels it supports tilt functionality and it comes with various replaceable tips when not in use it can attach via magnets to the side of the laptop in total transparency i m not an artist myself but i found the touch functionality both with and without the pen incredibly responsive when it comes to ports i think you get all the ports you really need on such a laptop you have two usbc ports that are both thunderbolt 4 and are used for charging the laptop and those ports support the new display port 2
